name: Canja De Galinha (Chicken Soup with Lemon And
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken in a large saucepan. Add the giblets, water, onions, celery, salt, and bay leaves. Cover and simmer over low heat for 2 hours.
2. Remove the cooked chicken and let it cool. Stir occasionally as the rice simmers until soft, about 20 to 30 minutes. Discard bones and skin.
3. Cut the meat into small strips and add it back to the broth. Add lemon juice and serve sprinkled with mint. Serves 6 to 8.
